trades.reasoning: Highest score in the screener (95) with RSI in the ideal bullish momentum zone at 65.7 — not overbought, MACD confirmed bullish crossover, and price extended above SMA-20; best risk/reward setup available today.
Score 90 with RSI 67.3 in the bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, and price 10.8% above SMA-20 indicating strong institutional accumulation in a risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ leading at +1.4%, giving a green light to deploy the $1,546 in idle cash. MARA and NSIT stand out as the cleanest setups — both score 90+ and have RSI in the 65-68 bullish momentum zone rather than the overbought >70 zone where most other candidates sit. Existing positions in NVDA, AMZN, EAT, OLED, and QQQ are all held; NVDA continues to show strong momentum at score 90 with the current price near cost basis so no add needed yet.

market_education.summary_en: Equity markets rallied broadly today as risk appetite returned, with technology leading the charge — the NASDAQ surged 1.4% while the broader S&P 500 gained 0.8%. The outperformance of growth and tech names suggests investors are pricing in a more favorable macro backdrop, likely driven by easing trade tensions and resilient corporate earnings expectations. The breadth of the rally, with momentum stocks across semiconductors, software, and crypto-adjacent names all participating, reinforces a short-term bullish bias.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面反彈，風險偏好明顯回升，科技板塊領漲——納斯達克指數大漲1.4%，標普500指數亦上揚0.8%。成長股與科技類股的強勢表現，反映出市場對宏觀環境改善的預期升温，貿易局勢緩和及企業盈利前景穩健是主要支撐因素。半導體、軟件及加密貨幣相關股票的動能股普遍同步上漲，進一步印證短線多頭格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved — a reading between 55 and 70 is considered the 'bullish momentum zone' where a stock has strong upward momentum but isn't yet overextended. Above 70 is 'overbought,' meaning the rally may be running out of steam and a pullback is more likely. Today we picked MARA and NSIT specifically because their RSIs sat in the 65-68 sweet spot, giving better risk/reward than the many candidates already above 70.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價的漲跌速度與幅度——RSI介於55至70之間被視為「強勢動能區間」，代表股票仍有上升動力，但尚未過度延伸。RSI超過70則屬「超買」，意味著升勢可能趨於疲軟，回調風險上升。今日選擇MARA和NSIT，正是因為其RSI處於65至68的黃金區間，相比大多數已進入超買區的候選股，風險回報比更為理想。
